attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT WK.BK_DEAL_QT_LN_CONCESSION_KEY,
       WK.BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY,
       WK.BK_QUOTE_NUM,
       WK.BK_DEAL_CONCESSION_SOURCE_NUM,
       WK.CONCESSION_PERCENT,
       WK.CONCESSION_USD_AMT,
       WK.CONCESSION_EXPIRATION_DT,
       WK.DISCOUNT_NAME,
       WK.REQUESTED_NON_STANDARD_DISCOUN,
       WK.APPROVED_NON_STANDARD_DISCOUNT,
       WK.ADJUSTMENT_PRICE_AMT,
       WK.SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_CD,
       WK.SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_NAME,
       WK.APPLIED_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
       WK.SK_CONCESSION_OBJECT_ID_INT,
       WK.RU_BK_REBATE_TRX_TYPE_CD,
       WK.RU_BK_REBATE_PAYMENT_SYSTEM_CD,
       WK.EDW_CREATE_DTM,
       WK.EDW_CREATE_USER,
       WK.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
       WK.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
       WK.BK_CONCESSION_TYPE_NAME,
       WK.CONCESSION_APPLIED_FLG,
       WK.MANUALLY_APPLIED_DISCOUNT_FLG,
       WK.PRICING_SCENARIO_LN_KEY,
       WK.SRC_RPTD_CHANNEL_PROGRAM_NAME,
       WK.SRC_RPTD_PROMOTION_REV_NUM,
       WK.DISCOUNT_METHOD_CD,
       WK.SRC_RPTD_DISCOUNT_PER_QTY_AMT,
       WK.DV_DISCOUNT_PER_QTY_PCT,
       WK.DV_DSCNT_PERQTY_LMPSUM_USD_AMT,
       WK.ADJUSTED_SELLING_PRICE_USD_AMT,
       WK.SRC_UPDATED_DTM,
       WK.DV_SRC_UPDATED_DT,
       WK.SRC_CREATION_DTM,
       WK.DV_SRC_CREATION_DT,
	   WK.SS_CODE,
	   WK.INSTANCE_ID,
	   WK.ROUNDED_TOTAL_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT,
       WK.UNROUNDED_TOTAL_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT
  FROM $$WORKDB.W_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_CONCESSION WK
   WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_CONCESSION NDQLC /* Added as part of CCW data fix Aug rel */
				WHERE TRIM(CAST(WK.BK_QUOTE_NUM AS BIGINT))=TRIM(CAST(NDQLC.BK_QUOTE_NUM AS BIGINT))
				 AND WK.SS_CODE = NDQLC.SS_CODE )
